status.description: Possible status value for SEP-6 transactions
status.title: StatusSEP6

type.description: The method the user used to deposit or withdraw offchain funds.

id.description: The ID of the transaction in the Stellar network.

memo.description: The memo of the transaction in the Stellar network.

memo_type.description: The memo type of the transaction in the Stellar network. Should be present if memo is not null.

created_at.description: The time the transaction was registered in the Stellar network.

envelope.description: The transaction envelope, containing all the transaction information.

id.description: The ID of the payment in the Stellar Network.

payment_type.description: The type of payment in the Stellar Network.

source_account.description: The account being debited in the Stellar Network.

destination_account.description: The account being credited in the Stellar Network.

memo_type.description: The memo type of the transaction in the Stellar network. Should be present if memo is not null.
memo_type.title: MemoType

refund_memo.description: If provided, this memo should be used for refund transactions.

refund_memo_type.description: The memo type of the transaction in the Stellar network. Should be present if memo is not null.
refund_memo_type.title: MemoType

customers.description: The user that initiated the transaction is both the sender and receiver.

sender.description:
StellarId's are objects that identify end-users and SEP-31 Sending Anchors, but not SEP-31 Receiving Anchors.

For a SEP-12 customer, the `id` field should be sufficient to fully identify the customer in the business' Backend.

For a SEP-31 Sending Anchor, the `account` and `memo` fields should be used.

For a SEP-6 or SEP-24 Anchor, the `account` and `memo` fields should be used.

id.description: The `id` of the customer registered through SEP-12.

account.description: Either the Stellar account or Muxed account address of the on-chain entity.

memo.description: The memo value identifying a customer with a shared account, where the shared account is `account`.

sender.title: StellarId

receiver.description:

For a SEP-31 Sending Anchor, the `account` and `memo` fields should be used.

For a SEP-6 or SEP-24 Anchor, the `account` and `memo` fields should be used.

account.description: Either the Stellar account or Muxed account address of the on-chain entity.

memo.description: The memo value identifying a customer with a shared account, where the shared account is `account`.

customers.description:
The Identification info of the sending and receiving customers. If they were created through [SEP-12](https://stellar.org/protocol/sep-12),
this object should contain the SEP-12 customer `id`. Otherwise, the `account` address of the customer.
